user.title: NVIDIA Shield Remote
user.description: Configure and pair a Shield device that exposes NVIDIA's remote service on TCP port 8987.

pin.title: Pair NVIDIA Shield
pin.description: A pairing PIN should be visible on {name}. Enter it to finish setup.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure NVIDIA Shield Remote
reconfigure.description: Update the Shield connection details and pair again.

reauth.title: Pair NVIDIA Shield
reauth.description: Request a new pairing PIN for {name}.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Shield remote service
error.invalid_pin: The PIN was not accepted by the Shield
